rationale: Review 1 identifies the material placement mismatch (new file under AlgebraicGroup/FunctorOfPoints but content is only generic Bialgebra/Hopf extensions of Mathlib.Convolution with no Spec/GrpObj/AffineScheme; helper lemma + antipodeComp also wrongly scoped), directly fixing file layout + docs. Review 2's internal namespace nit on one private-use lemma is real but trivial by comparison; acting on Review 1 yields the meaningfully better-structured PR.
